issue_summary: PhraseQuery and PhrasePrefixQuery are extended. It's now possible to specify the relative position of a term within a phrase. This allows gaps and multiple terms at the same position.
javadoc_before: /** Adds a term to the end of the query phrase. */
javadoc_after:
/**
   * Adds a term to the end of the query phrase.
   * The relative position of the term is the one immediately after the last term added.
   */
